---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I always have to [...] because [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Other solutions or features you've considered, and why this proposal is preferred.

## Success Criteria

How will we know this feature is successfully implemented?

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or links that help clarify the request.
